calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-28-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Simrin for Executor.

Mr. Simrin stated that the services performed were services that are not ordinally provided. The Court stated that it was inclined to deny the request for extraordinary fees on the basis that the statutory fees adequately cover the services. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Nuque.
